instruction: Help me record the regional sales status

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Region'
ws['B1'] = 'Q1 Target(10K CNY)'
ws['C1'] = 'Q1 Actual(10K CNY)'
ws['D1'] = 'Q2 Forecast(10K CNY)'
ws['A2'] = 'East Region'
ws['B2'] = 1200
ws['C2'] = 1320
ws['D2'] = 1450
ws['A3'] = 'South Region'
ws['B3'] = 900
ws['C3'] = 952
ws['D3'] = 1050
ws['A4'] = 'North Region'
ws['B4'] = 800
ws['C4'] = 812
ws['D4'] = 900
ws['A5'] = 'West Region'
ws['B5'] = 600
ws['C5'] = 516
ws['D5'] = 680
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/regional_sales.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me record the regional sales status

Find the number of regions that exceeded Q1 targets from /home/user/Desktop/regional_sales.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/regional_note.txt: 'Q1 Over-achieved Regions: 3 (East, South, North)', save
